_comment: Curated supporter-venue ground truth — see supporters.atlanta.json for schema. verified:false = needs a local confirmation pass before launch.

venues.name: The Football Factory
venues.note: King West soccer bar dedicated to football; supporters' groups for many nations meet here for internationals.

venues.name: Scallywags
venues.note: Yonge & Eglinton soccer pub; opens at dawn for European fixtures.

venues.name: The Queen & Beaver Public House
venues.note: Downtown English public house; passionate Three Lions following on match days.
